Email campaign management
Retrieve all email campaigns (mailings) in the account.

Transactional email and SMS messaging
Send a transactional email or SMS message to a single recipient using an XML API call.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Campaign reporting and analytics
Retrieve aggregate performance metrics for a sent campaign.

Marketing automation program management
Retrieve all marketing automation programs in the account.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Retrieve details and status of a specific marketing automation program.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

The Silverpop Engage API, now provided as Acoustic Campaign (formerly IBM Watson Campaign Automation), enables digital marketers to manage contact lists, execute email campaigns, send transactional messages, and track engagement through a REST and XML-based interface.

Contact Support:
